message:
✨ Add build failure handling to copilot-automation

When a Netlify build fails on a Copilot PR:
- Posts a comment tagging @Copilot to fix the error
- Includes the build URL for error details
- Avoids duplicate comments within 30 minutes

This bridges plain GHA to Copilot for code fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
